sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89759" key="prosmoixeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσμοιχεύω</orth>, <sense id="n89759.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">commit adultery in addition</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:118:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
